ideas.name: Customer Support Triage Agent
ideas.desc: AI agent that reads incoming support tickets, classifies severity, routes to the right team, and drafts an initial response — cutting first-response time from 4 hours to under 10 minutes.

ideas.name: Sales Meeting Prep Agent
ideas.desc: Before every client meeting, this agent pulls CRM data, recent emails, LinkedIn updates, and news mentions to generate a 1-page account brief with talking points and upsell opportunities.

ideas.name: Invoice Processing Autopilot
ideas.desc: Reads incoming invoices (PDF/email), extracts line items, matches to POs, flags discrepancies, and queues approved invoices for payment — eliminating 20 hours/week of manual AP work.

ideas.name: Employee Onboarding Concierge
ideas.desc: Guides new hires through their first 30 days: schedules orientation meetings, provisions accounts, answers policy questions, and checks in weekly to make sure nothing fell through the cracks.

ideas.name: IT Helpdesk Auto-Resolver
ideas.desc: Handles common IT tickets automatically — password resets, VPN issues, software access requests. Resolves 60% of tier-1 tickets without human intervention and escalates the rest with full context.

ideas.name: Weekly Status Report Generator
ideas.desc: Pulls data from Jira, Teams, and email to auto-generate project status reports every Friday. Highlights blockers, tracks milestones, and emails the summary to stakeholders.

ideas.name: Contract Review Assistant
ideas.desc: Scans vendor contracts for non-standard clauses, liability risks, and missing terms. Generates a redline summary so legal can focus on negotiation instead of reading 40-page PDFs.

ideas.name: Marketing Content Repurposer
ideas.desc: Takes a single blog post or case study and generates 5 LinkedIn posts, 3 tweets, an email newsletter snippet, and a slide for the sales deck — all in brand voice.
